title: Gemma-4 12B + Hermes,Google AI Edge: EASY, GOOD & LOCAL!
summary: Google introduced Gemma-4 12B, a multimodal model with unified encoder-free architecture for text, vision, and audio. It runs on consumer laptops with 16GB VRAM and includes multi-token prediction drafters for reduced latency. The model integrates with LiteRT-LM, Ollama, Hermes, and other local AI tools via OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
